/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libAsmValidator.dylib -install_name @rpath/libAsmValidator.dylib CMakeFiles/AsmValidator.dir/plugin/AsmValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsmValidator.dir/plugin/AsmTokenizer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangAST.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangFrontend.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangBasic.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangOptions.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangParse.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangSerialization.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangSema.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangAPINotes.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangEdit.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangAnalysisLifetimeSafety.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangAnalysis.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangAST.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangFormat.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangToolingInclusions.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangToolingCore.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangRewrite.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangLex.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangBasic.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libclangSupport.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.4/lib/libLLVM.dylib
